Export a run manifest

run_manifest_export.Rd

Exports artifact metadata to a deterministic JSON manifest suitable for downstream consumption and reproducibility records.

Usage

run_manifest_export(
  path,
  catalog = NULL,
  dir = "artifacts://",
  run_id = NULL,
  recursive = TRUE,
  include_without_sidecar = FALSE
)

Arguments

path

Output JSON file path.

catalog

Optional artifact catalog tibble. If NULL, one is built via artifact_catalog().

dir

Directory/alias passed to artifact_catalog() when catalog is NULL.

run_id

Optional run identifier to filter upstream_run_id.

recursive

Passed to artifact_catalog() when catalog is NULL.

include_without_sidecar

Passed to artifact_catalog() when catalog is NULL.

Value

Invisibly returns the normalized output path.

On this page
